name: vscode-work-terminal-v3
description: A VS Code port of work-terminal with a board-first workflow and per-item terminal sessions.

workTerminal.claudeCommand.description: Command used to launch Claude sessions.

workTerminal.claudeExtraArgs.description: Extra arguments appended when launching Claude sessions.

workTerminal.copilotCommand.description: Command used to launch Copilot sessions.

workTerminal.copilotExtraArgs.description: Extra arguments appended when launching Copilot sessions.

workTerminal.strandsCommand.description: Command used to launch Strands sessions.

workTerminal.strandsExtraArgs.description: Extra arguments appended when launching Strands sessions.

workTerminal.agentProfiles.markdownDescription: Optional full profile configuration. When unset, Work Terminal derives the built-in Claude, Copilot, and Strands profiles from the legacy command settings. Use the `Work Terminal: Manage Profiles` command or edit this setting directly for custom profiles and ordering.

id.description: Stable profile id used for launches and restored sessions.

kind.description: Profile behavior. Claude adds resume session ids. The other kinds launch the configured command directly.

command.description: Command used to launch the profile. Multi-token commands are supported.

extraArgs.description: Extra arguments appended after the command tokens.

usesContext.description: When true, Work Terminal sends the work item context prompt after launch.

scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test
scripts.package: pnpm run check && pnpm run build && pnpm exec vsce package
scripts.vscode:prepublish: pnpm run check && pnpm run build
